description: Style Note Built with the breathability and zero-distraction Fit that athletes demand for focus, these nike running shorts are a great buy. These high-performance shorts feature a supportive build with fabric that rapidly wicks sweat away from the body. Product Details Grey cotton shorts with an elasticated waistband and drawstrings at the inner Two pockets on the sides and a pocket at the back (with a Velcro closure) Material and Care 100% cotton Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight Remove dust with a dry clean cloth
